settings.text: Reduces the association's energy costs by 30–60%
Improves the building's energy class and market value
Stable fees over time – less exposure to electricity price fluctuations
Sustainable profile – important for members and prospective buyers
Feasibility study and energy analysis of the property
Decision basis for the board and meeting, including ROI and payback period
Installation and commissioning with minimal disruption to residents
Aftermarket: service agreement and ongoing optimisation
